name: Triune Paradox – Axiarch of the End Code
desc:
3+ Effect Monsters, including 3 monsters with different original names and archetype.
Must first be Link Summoned.
If this card is Link Summoned: You can pay half your LP; shuffle all cards from both GYs into the Deck, then banish all cards in both players' Extra Decks, face-down.
Once per turn, you can return 1 card in the banishment, banish 1 card in opponent's hand until the end of this turn. This is a Quick Effect if this card is co-linked.
